'''鈭歞h-d-p''' ('''kadhadap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbarrel|unbarrel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbarrel|unbarrel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-d-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhadap|thidhadap]] || [[word:jidhadap|jidhadap]] || [[word:shidhadap|shidhadap]] || [[word:kidhadap|kidhadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhadap|thuthudhadap]] || [[word:jujudhadap|jujudhadap]] || [[word:shushudhadap|shushudhadap]] || [[word:kukudhadap|kukudhadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhadap|thudhadap]] || [[word:judhadap|judhadap]] || [[word:shudhadap|shudhadap]] || [[word:kudhadap|kudhadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhadap|thudhadap]] || [[word:judhadap|judhadap]] || [[word:shudhadap|shudhadap]] || [[word:kudhadap|kudhadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhadap|thedhadap]] || [[word:jedhadap|jedhadap]] || [[word:shedhadap|shedhadap]] || [[word:kedhadap|kedhadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhadap|thothodhadap]] || [[word:jojodhadap|jojodhadap]] || [[word:shoshodhadap|shoshodhadap]] || [[word:kokodhadap|kokodhadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhadap|thodhadap]] || [[word:jodhadap|jodhadap]] || [[word:shodhadap|shodhadap]] || [[word:kodhadap|kodhadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhadap|thodhadap]] || [[word:jodhadap|jodhadap]] || [[word:shodhadap|shodhadap]] || [[word:kodhadap|kodhadap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]] || [[word:dhadap|dhadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhadap|th忙dhadap]] || [[word:j忙dhadap|j忙dhadap]] || [[word:sh忙dhadap|sh忙dhadap]] || [[word:k忙dhadap|k忙dhadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhadap|thathadhadap]] || [[word:jajadhadap|jajadhadap]] || [[word:shashadhadap|shashadhadap]] || [[word:kakadhadap|kakadhadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhadap|thadhadap]] || [[word:jadhadap|jadhadap]] || [[word:shadhadap|shadhadap]] || [[word:kadhadap|kadhadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhadap|thadhadap]] || [[word:jadhadap|jadhadap]] || [[word:shadhadap|shadhadap]] || [[word:kadhadap|kadhadap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhadap|shadhadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhadap|goshadhadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhadap|gokishadhadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhadapn眉|shadhadapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkn眉|goshadhadapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadapn眉|gokishadhadapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhadapsh毛|shadhadapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhadapnksh毛|goshadhadapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhadapsh毛|gokishadhadapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadapro|shadhadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkro|goshadhadapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadapro|gokishadhadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadapmu|shadhadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkmu|goshadhadapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadapmu|gokishadhadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhadapsher|shadhadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhadapnksher|goshadhadapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhadapsher|gokishadhadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhadapng|shadhadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkng|goshadhadapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhadapng|gokishadhadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhadapya|shadhadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkya|goshadhadapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhadapya|gokishadhadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhadapyam|shadhadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkyam|goshadhadapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhadapyam|gokishadhadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadapn眉sh毛|shadhadapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkn眉sh毛|goshadhadapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadapn眉sh毛|gokishadhadapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadapn眉ro|shadhadapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkn眉ro|goshadhadapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadapn眉ro|gokishadhadapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadapn眉mu|shadhadapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkn眉mu|goshadhadapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadapn眉mu|gokishadhadapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadapsh毛n眉|shadhadapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadapnksh毛n眉|goshadhadapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadapsh毛n眉|gokishadhadapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadapsh毛ro|shadhadapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadapnksh毛ro|goshadhadapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadapsh毛ro|gokishadhadapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadapsh毛mu|shadhadapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadapnksh毛mu|goshadhadapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadapsh毛mu|gokishadhadapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadapron眉|shadhadapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkron眉|goshadhadapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadapron眉|gokishadhadapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadaprosh毛|shadhadaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkrosh毛|goshadhadapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadaprosh毛|gokishadhadaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadapromu|shadhadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkromu|goshadhadapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadapromu|gokishadhadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadapmun眉|shadhadapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkmun眉|goshadhadapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadapmun眉|gokishadhadapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadapmush毛|shadhadapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkmush毛|goshadhadapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadapmush毛|gokishadhadapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadapmuro|shadhadapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadapnkmuro|goshadhadapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadapmuro|gokishadhadapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
